---
title: "A precision environmental health approach to childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction: identifying biological pathways and prenatal determinants"
date: 2024-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Multi-omics
  - Exposome
  - Metabolic Health
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Stratakis N, Anguita Ruiz A, <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Maitre L, Gonz&aacute;lez JR, Andrusaityte S, Basaga&ntilde;a X, Borr&agrave;s E, Keun HC, Chatzi L, et al. "A precision environmental health approach to childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction: identifying biological pathways and prenatal determinants." Presented at the ISEE Annual Conference 2024 (2024). doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1289/isee.2024.0593"><code>10.1289/isee.2024.0593</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Abstract
      url: https://doi.org/10.1289/isee.2024.0593
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1289/isee.2024.0593
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1289/isee.2024.0593
---

**Conference:** ISEE Annual Conference 2024

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@inproceedings{stratakis2024precision,
  title={A precision environmental health approach to childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction: identifying biological pathways and prenatal determinants},
  author={Stratakis, Nikos and Anguita Ruiz, Augusto and Fabbri, Lorenzo and Maitre, L{\'e}a and Gonz{\'a}lez, Juan R and Andrusaityte, Sandra and Basaga{\~n}a, Xavier and Borr{\`a}s, Eva and Keun, Hector C and Chatzi, Lida and others},
  booktitle={ISEE Annual Conference 2024},
  year={2024}
}
```
